nvidia/nemotron-3-nano.description: Efficient hybrid MoE reasoning model aimed at agentic workloads, long-context tasks, and high-throughput local inference.

qwen/qwen3-coder-next.description: Coding-focused reasoning model for agentic software tasks, repository editing, and long-context tool use.

qwen/qwen3-coder-30b.description: Larger Qwen3-Coder variant for code generation, repository work, and tool-using coding agents when you want more headroom than the Next local variant.

liquid/lfm2-24b-a2b.description: General-purpose hybrid instruct model optimized for efficient on-device deployment, function calling, and privacy-sensitive local workflows.

openai/gpt-oss-20b.description: Open-weight local reasoning model suited to structured outputs, tool use, and general assistant work.

text-embedding-nomic-embed-text-v1.5.description: Open text embedding model for retrieval, clustering, and classification, with Matryoshka dimensionality reduction and long-context support.
